---
title: 'Coming Expected'
date: '2011-04-19T14:46:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Azarea Anne Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5015954456807607042'
blogger_filename: '/2011/04/coming-expected.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Azarea Anne Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
---

Azarea,<br />
<br />
Connor has been insistant for nearly a year that you are coming. So... I assume that means you'll be coming soon. He nearly always eventually get's what he wants from God! lol
